prompt: A cinematic nighttime automotive action shot of a futuristic electric sports coupe racing through a modern downtown city, viewed from a low rear three-quarter tracking angle. The car is a sleek Audi concept vehicle with a glossy white body, black roofline, dark tinted windows, extremely wide rear tires, illuminated rear light bar, and glowing tron branding centered on the back. The rear lower section is partially transparent or open, revealing advanced electric drivetrain and battery hardware with metallic detail and cool blue illumination. Add flowing pale gray and blue side graphics on the doors and rear quarter panels for a concept-car look. The vehicle is driving fast on a wet multi-lane urban expressway, with strong motion blur in the asphalt, lane markings, and surrounding buildings. The background is filled with tall glass office towers at night, hundreds of bright window lights, scattered red aircraft warning lights on rooftops, and streaking traffic lights in the distance. Include reflections along a barrier or wall on the far left edge to emphasize speed and camera motion. Lighting is cool, high-contrast, and moody, with blue-white highlights, glossy reflections on the road, and a premium sci-fi luxury aesthetic. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, long-exposure feel, dynamic tracking shot, sharp focus on the car while the city environment blurs from speed.
